name: StatChannels
short: Live counter / stat voice channels (members, online, boosts …).
description: Keep voice (or any) channel names updated with live server stats like member count, humans, bots, boosts. Opt-in per guild, bilingual (DE/EN), with web dashboard integration. Channel renames are rate-limit friendly (updated every ~10 minutes).
author: Domekologe
install_msg:
Thanks for installing StatChannels!

Load it with `[p]load statchannels`, then configure it via its commands or the PDC web dashboard (if installed).
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-server counter/stat channel configuration only. It does not persistently store personal data about users.
